targets.query:
from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resource-status_running")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["resource-name"] == "EWEST" )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resource-status_running")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["resource-name"] == "RWEST" )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["resource-name"] == "DPWE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "resource-status_running")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["deploymentName"] == "WEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._measurement == "trail-input_trail-seq" or
      r._measurement == "trail-input_trail-rba"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.processName == "RWEST")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _measurement:
        if r._measurement == "trail-input_trail-seq" then "SEQ"
        else if r._measurement == "trail-input_trail-rba" then "RBA"
        else r._measurement
  }))
  // IMPORTANT: Recompute the group key to propagate the new _measurement
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._measurement == "trail-output_trail-seq" or
      r._measurement == "trail-output_trail-rba"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.processName == "EWEST")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _measurement:
        if r._measurement == "trail-output_trail-seq" then "SEQ"
        else if r._measurement == "trail-output_trail-rba" then "RBA"
        else r._measurement
  }))
  // IMPORTANT: Recompute the group key to propagate the new _measurement
  |> group(columns: ["_measurement", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "DPWE")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "position-er_last-operation-lag")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "value" and
    r["_measurement"] == "position-high-operation-lag" and
    r["deploymentName"] == "WEST" and
    r["processType"] == "extract" and
    r["processName"] == "EWEST"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "EWEST-lag")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "value" and
    r["_measurement"] == "position-er_high-watermark-lag" and
    r["deploymentName"] == "EAST" and
    r["processType"] == "replicat" and
    r["processName"] == "RWEST"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "RWEST-lag")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "value" and
    r["_measurement"] == "position-er_low-watermark-lag" and
    r["deploymentName"] == "WEST" and
    r["processType"] == "extract" and
    r["processName"] == "EWEST"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "EWEST-low-watermark-lag")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "value" and
    r["_measurement"] == "position-er_low-watermark-lag" and
    r["deploymentName"] == "EAST" and
    r["processType"] == "replicat" and
    r["processName"] == "RWEST"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "RWEST-low-watermark-lag")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "statistics-extract_mapped-total-updates")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "EWEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "statistics-replicat_mapped-total-updates")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "RWEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "EEAST" or r["processName"] == "EWEST" or r["processName"] == "REAST" or r["processName"] == "RWEST")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "position-er_last-operation-lag")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "statistics-extract_mapped-total-deletes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "EWEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "statistics-replicat_mapped-total-deletes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "RWEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "statistics-extract_mapped-total-inserts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "EWEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "oggbucket")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "statistics-replicat_mapped-total-inserts")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["processName"] == "RWEST")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"

v1.tagValues(
  bucket: "oggbucket",
  tag: "processName",
  predicate: (r) => r.processType == "extract" or (r.processType == "replicat" and r.processName !~ /[0-9]$/),
  start: v.timeRangeStart
)
list.label: Process Name
list.name: ProcessName

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/v1"

v1.tagValues(
  bucket: "oggbucket",
  tag: "processName",
  predicate: (r) => r.processType == "extract" or (r.processType == "replicat" and r.processName !~ /[0-9]$/),
  start: v.timeRangeStart
)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

b = "oggbucket"

// Pull names from all three possible tags independently.
// (No range needed; uses tag catalogs.)
v1 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "resource-name")
      |> rename(columns: {_value: "_value"})
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

v2 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "pathName")
      |> rename(columns: {_value: "_value"})
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

v3 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "processName")
      |> rename(columns: {_value: "_value"})
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

// Union & clean:
// - drop names ending with digits (…00, …01, …02)
// - optionally, keep only names that LOOK like paths (often start with "DP")
union(tables: [v1, v2, v3])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not r._value =~ /.*\d$/)      // exclude Replicat threads
  // |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value =~ /^DP/)         // <— optional: keep only names starting with DP
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])
list.label: Process Name 2
list.name: ProcessName2

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

b = "oggbucket"

// Pull names from all three possible tags independently.
// (No range needed; uses tag catalogs.)
v1 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "resource-name")
      |> rename(columns: {_value: "_value"})
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

v2 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "pathName")
      |> rename(columns: {_value: "_value"})
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

v3 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "processName")
      |> rename(columns: {_value: "_value"})
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

// Union & clean:
// - drop names ending with digits (…00, …01, …02)
// - optionally, keep only names that LOOK like paths (often start with "DP")
union(tables: [v1, v2, v3])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not r._value =~ /.*\d$/)      // exclude Replicat threads
  // |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value =~ /^DP/)         // <— optional: keep only names starting with DP
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

b = "oggbucket"

// Pull candidate names from several possible tag keys
v1 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "deployment")
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
v2 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "deploymentName")
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
v3 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "deployment-name")
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
v4 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "serviceName")  // some exporters use this

union(tables: [v1, v2, v3, v4])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r._value and r._value != "")
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])
list.label: Deployment Name
list.name: DeploymentName

query.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"

b = "oggbucket"

// Pull candidate names from several possible tag keys
v1 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "deployment")
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
v2 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "deploymentName")
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
v3 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "deployment-name")
      |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
v4 = schema.tagValues(bucket: b, tag: "serviceName")  // some exporters use this

union(tables: [v1, v2, v3, v4])
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r._value and r._value != "")
  |> distinct(column: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])
